description.zh: 红队渗透代理池搭建，结合BurpSuite、passive-scan-client和xray实现流量转发和被动扫描。
description.en: Red team penetration agent pool setup, combining BurpSuite, passive-scan-client and xray for traffic forwarding and passive scanning.

content.zh: Scylla部署：python3 -m pip install -r requirements.txt && python3 -m scylla
content.en: Scylla deployment: python3 -m pip install -r requirements.txt && python3 -m scylla

content.zh: 运行逻辑：手工Burp渗透 -> 后台Xray扫描 -> 代理池作为Xray出口
content.en: Running logic: Manual Burp penetration -> Background Xray scan -> Proxy pool as Xray exit

content.zh: BurpSuite配置：Proxy Listeners监听127.0.0.1:8081，passive-scan-client插件转发流量
content.en: BurpSuite config: Proxy Listeners on 127.0.0.1:8081, passive-scan-client plugin forwards traffic
